Action: Business Issuer A creates first credential offer; Wallet receives offer A and performs initial issuance A with credential management ID mgmt_A
Data:
- Credential offer A deeplink
- DPoP binding key (A)
- Initial tokens and credentials for A
- Credential management ID: mgmt_A
Expected Result: Initial issuance A completed; database contains 1 credential offer linked to mgmt_A

Action: Wallet refreshes token for issuance A and performs first renewal A
Data:
- Refresh token (A)
- DPoP binding key (A)
- Token endpoint and credential endpoint
- Renewed credentials from A
Expected Result: First renewal of A completed; database contains 2 credential offers linked to mgmt_A

Action: Business Issuer B creates second credential offer; Wallet receives offer B and performs initial issuance B with credential management ID mgmt_B
Data:
- Credential offer B deeplink
- DPoP binding key (B)
- Initial tokens and credentials for B
- Credential management ID: mgmt_B
Expected Result: Initial issuance B completed; database contains 1 credential offer linked to mgmt_B

Action: Wallet performs second renewal for A and renewal for B; Issuer correctly persists all credential offers with proper management linkage
Data:
- Refresh token (A) for second renewal
- Refresh token (B) for first renewal
- Renewed credentials from A and B
- Credential management tracking
Expected Result: Database contains 3 credential offers linked to mgmt_A; database contains 2 credential offers linked to mgmt_B; no cross-linking between management entities
